_comment: Optional config file. Pass via --config <path> on the grid CLI, or drop it next to the script as `config.json`. Defines sticky base LoRAs that stay loaded on top of every test LoRA, and the face-recognition settings used for per-row identity scoring. Remove the `face_recognition` block entirely to skip face scoring.

base_loras._comment: Optional. Up to N LoRAs that stay loaded for the whole run on top of each test LoRA — e.g. a stylistic baseline. Each entry needs `path` + a `weight` (1.0 = full strength).
base_loras.name: style-baseline

face_recognition._comment: Provide ONE of `centroid` (JSON list of float32) or `centroid_b64` (base64-encoded float32 blob — more compact). Build one from your own reference images: `python -m glt --compute-centroid <ref_dir> --centroid-out my_centroid.json --centroid-format b64`. The placeholder below MUST be replaced before the scorer will load.
